about.title: About Yolanda Farnese
about.intro: Yolanda Farnese is a tattoo artist based in Uberlandia - MG. Her work starts where the client's reference meets her artistic reading, with a Fine Line and Blackwork focus.
story: The goal of this site is to create a clear base for portfolio, style, and editorial pages without unsupported claims or filler content.
The structure is already prepared to receive galleries, descriptions, and Prismic-managed pages without changing the public navigation.

portfolio.title: Portfolio and styles
portfolio.intro: Browse the initial style and portfolio grouping scaffold. Final descriptions, galleries, and editorial variants will be published from Prismic.
portfolio.empty_state: Styles will appear here as soon as content is published.

portfolio_detail.not_found_description: This content is not available yet. Return to the listing or contact Yolanda directly.
portfolio_detail.gallery_empty_state: The gallery will be published through Prismic. This structure already accepts media without leaking raw CMS shapes into the UI.

contact.title: Contact and quote
contact.intro: Send a short message and open WhatsApp with the text pre-filled. Instagram and location links remain available as secondary actions.

form.whatsapp_message_template: Hello, Yolanda! I came through your website. My name is {name} and I want to talk about {projectType}. {description}

contact.channels_intro: Use the channel that makes the most sense for what you need right now.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.intro: This is an initial placeholder policy until the final legal copy is approved.

sections.title: Collected data
sections.body: The website may process the data you voluntarily share through the WhatsApp-first contact flow.

sections.title: Usage
sections.body: Data is used only to answer quote requests, contact messages, and portfolio-related inquiries.

sections.title: Updates
